mapper.select: select w.id, w.parent_id, w.node_code, w.node_name, w.description, w.owner_id, u.real_name as owner_name, w.level_no, w.sort_order from wbs_node w left join sys_user u on u.id = w.owner_id where w.project_id = #{projectId} and w.is_deleted = 0 order by w.level_no asc, w.sort_order asc, w.id asc

select w.id, w.parent_id, w.node_code, w.node_name, w.description, w.owner_id, u.real_name as owner_name, w.level_no, w.sort_order from wbs_node w left join sys_user u on u.id = w.owner_id where w.id = #{id} and w.is_deleted = 0

select id, project_id, parent_id, node_code, node_name, description, owner_id, sort_order, level_no, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, is_deleted from wbs_node where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: update wbs_node set parent_id = #{parentId}, node_code = #{nodeCode}, node_name = #{nodeName}, description = #{description}, owner_id = #{ownerId}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, level_no = #{levelNo}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id} and project_id = #{projectId} and is_deleted = 0
